arts.ttl: Report: Liverpool face prospect of first-teamer making summer transfer, Inter Milan target 34-game midfielder
arts.sum: Curtis Jones is liked by Inter Milan ahead of the summer transfer window, according to reports. The midfielder has been a consistent presence in Liverpool’s midfield this season, making 23 Premier League appearances and contributing three goals and as many assists.
